note: Added 15 new tests covering: long key rejection, listen port 0 rejection, preshared key all-zeros rejection, simultaneous multi-error collection (3+ errors), peer errors combined with config errors, CIDR edge cases (/0 and /32 for IPv4, /0 and /128 for IPv6), endpoint port edge cases (1, 65535, 65536), valid config with all optional fields, listen port boundary values (1, 65535). All 172 tests pass.
